title: Real-time trading dashboard rebuilt for scale
summary: Re-architected a legacy trading dashboard into a React + .NET system handling 40,000 live ticks per second without dropping a frame.

title: Fleet operations platform across 14 countries

title: Headless commerce replatform for peak-season scale

title: AI-assisted load forecasting for grid operators
summary: Integrated an LLM-assisted forecasting layer into existing SCADA tooling, giving operators plain-language grid insights in real time.

title: Mobile control suite for industrial robotics fleets
